title: cyanus intermedius
intro: Cyanus intermedius, also known as Cornflower or Intermediate Cornflower, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitussive effects. The health benefits of Cyanus intermedius include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, while also acting as a natural expectorant to help relieve coughs. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
